feed.title: whimsysoul
feed.subtitle: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from whimsysoul

entry.title: Was delulu but worked out. How did the past 10 years fly by so fast?! #sanfransisco #bayarea #casual #onlyinsf #california
entry.content: Was delulu but worked out. How did the past 10 years fly by so fast?! #sanfransisco #bayarea #casual #onlyinsf #california

entry.title: Once you get a taste of lounge life, you can never go back. I am so excited that The Club in SFO opened up this summer and it's available on Priority Pass. If you see me in here say hi cause I will be living in this lounge every time I'm at the airport no
entry.content: Once you get a taste of lounge life, you can never go back. I am so excited that The Club in SFO opened up this summer and it's available on Priority Pass. If you see me in here say hi cause I will be living in this lounge every time I'm at the airport no

entry.title: Haunted Hotels in California ⬇️👻 To all my fellow spooky season lovers, don't worry - there are TONS of great hotels in California that are also low-key haunted, if you wanted to be on theme for any fall trips this year. 👻👻 Some of my faves: @claremonthot
entry.content: Haunted Hotels in California ⬇️👻 To all my fellow spooky season lovers, don't worry - there are TONS of great hotels in California that are also low-key haunted, if you wanted to be on theme for any fall trips this year. 👻👻 Some of my faves: @claremonthot

entry.title: PUMPKIN DAY - I eat pumpkin-flavored things for every meal of the day. It's the best day of the year!! 👉 SEND THIS to someone you want to do a pumpkin day with!! ✨🎃 I started this tradition during 2020 for a little cheer and have been obsessed ever since.
entry.content: PUMPKIN DAY - I eat pumpkin-flavored things for every meal of the day. It's the best day of the year!! 👉 SEND THIS to someone you want to do a pumpkin day with!! ✨🎃 I started this tradition during 2020 for a little cheer and have been obsessed ever since.

entry.title: best Bay Area Haunted House just opened up!! 😱 The @Winchester Mystery House Unhinged Hotel haunted house is now OPEN for spooky season. It's an immersive event with indoor and outdoor haunts. (45 mins to get through the house normally or "10 mins if you
entry.content: best Bay Area Haunted House just opened up!! 😱 The @Winchester Mystery House Unhinged Hotel haunted house is now OPEN for spooky season. It's an immersive event with indoor and outdoor haunts. (45 mins to get through the house normally or "10 mins if you

entry.title: such a life saver!! Just ask the front desk for a sewing kit, it's free and most (good) hotels will have one! #sewingkit #travelhack #traveltip #travellife #traveling #hotels #sewingtiktok
entry.content: such a life saver!! Just ask the front desk for a sewing kit, it's free and most (good) hotels will have one! #sewingkit #travelhack #traveltip #travellife #traveling #hotels #sewingtiktok

entry.title: they win at Halloween! 🎃This pumpkin farm in California goes ALL out for Halloween and I'm so here for it. And their 2024 opening day is the last weekend of September (this weekend!!! EKK!!) 📍 @thespinafarmspumpkinpatch in the South Bay has DINOSAURS 🦖 j
entry.content: they win at Halloween! 🎃This pumpkin farm in California goes ALL out for Halloween and I'm so here for it. And their 2024 opening day is the last weekend of September (this weekend!!! EKK!!) 📍 @thespinafarmspumpkinpatch in the South Bay has DINOSAURS 🦖 j

entry.title: Cow Cuddling in the Bay Area!! 🐄🐄 Yes, this is a thing and it’s SO much fun!! Bay Area Cows / Sri Surabhi Go Ksetra is a cow sanctuary located in Pleasanton Tri Valley area. @Visit Tri-Valley They rescue Gir cows from Mexico and give them pampered, happy
entry.content: Cow Cuddling in the Bay Area!! 🐄🐄 Yes, this is a thing and it’s SO much fun!! Bay Area Cows / Sri Surabhi Go Ksetra is a cow sanctuary located in Pleasanton Tri Valley area. @Visit Tri-Valley They rescue Gir cows from Mexico and give them pampered, happy

entry.title: Bay Area Wine Trolley!!!😱 Why go normal wine tasting when you can hop on the @Livermore Wine Trolley to different vineyards?! 🍷🍷 I just spent a few days in @Visit Tri-Valley and absolutely had to check out their famous wine trolley. It’s such a blast,
entry.content: Bay Area Wine Trolley!!!😱 Why go normal wine tasting when you can hop on the @Livermore Wine Trolley to different vineyards?! 🍷🍷 I just spent a few days in @Visit Tri-Valley and absolutely had to check out their famous wine trolley. It’s such a blast,

entry.title: Rare chance to photograph in a vineyard at sunset!! Usually vineyards close around 5pm and I never get a chance to make content there during sunset or golden hour. While on a media trip to Tri Valley this week, I was at a winemakers dinner a Murrieta's W
entry.content: Rare chance to photograph in a vineyard at sunset!! Usually vineyards close around 5pm and I never get a chance to make content there during sunset or golden hour. While on a media trip to Tri Valley this week, I was at a winemakers dinner a Murrieta's W

entry.title: Best WFH coffee shop / bar in San Francisco!! Meet up with some friends for a post-work happy hour at The Social Study in the Fillmore. Love the decor and their cocktail menu. Check this place out!! #sanfrancisco #sanfranciscolife #wfh #remotework #sanfr
entry.content: Best WFH coffee shop / bar in San Francisco!! Meet up with some friends for a post-work happy hour at The Social Study in the Fillmore. Love the decor and their cocktail menu. Check this place out!! #sanfrancisco #sanfranciscolife #wfh #remotework #sanfr

entry.title: Curvy girl @Sézane ootn for their 2-year anniversary in San Francisco!! 🔗 outfit on LTK Despite being a French brand, Sezane actually fits my curves so well. I've been obsessed with their pieces ever since they opened in San Francisco -- amazing staples
entry.content: Curvy girl @Sézane ootn for their 2-year anniversary in San Francisco!! 🔗 outfit on LTK Despite being a French brand, Sezane actually fits my curves so well. I've been obsessed with their pieces ever since they opened in San Francisco -- amazing staples

entry.title: SF Sunset Night Market is BACK!! I just went to the 3rd Sunset Night Market on Irving and it's better than ever. I went to the 1st one they held last year and idk if you remember it, but it made headlines for being too popular and thus too overcrowded!!
entry.content: SF Sunset Night Market is BACK!! I just went to the 3rd Sunset Night Market on Irving and it's better than ever. I went to the 1st one they held last year and idk if you remember it, but it made headlines for being too popular and thus too overcrowded!!

entry.title: BAY AREA, if you love food trucks and great cocktails you need to check out the adorable airstream food truck at the @citizenM Menlo Park! ❤️🌭🍸 This spot is such a vibe, makes a perfect after-work happy hour place to soak up some sunshine, play cornhole,
entry.content: BAY AREA, if you love food trucks and great cocktails you need to check out the adorable airstream food truck at the @citizenM Menlo Park! ❤️🌭🍸 This spot is such a vibe, makes a perfect after-work happy hour place to soak up some sunshine, play cornhole,

entry.title: you should always get up early while traveling! It's a must to actually enjoy tourist hot spots. Grab coffee and just goooo go goooo. Don't drag your feet and you'll get popular spots all to yourself! #travelhack #travellife #london #bigben #earlybird #en
entry.content: you should always get up early while traveling! It's a must to actually enjoy tourist hot spots. Grab coffee and just goooo go goooo. Don't drag your feet and you'll get popular spots all to yourself! #travelhack #travellife #london #bigben #earlybird #en

entry.title: Have you heard of the Tri-Valley in California? On the edge of The Bay Area is @Visit Tri-Valley (Livermore, Dublin, Pleasanton, Danville region ) and it’s packed with so many fun hidden gems. 🍷🐄🍦 After many years of driving past this area on my way out o
entry.content: Have you heard of the Tri-Valley in California? On the edge of The Bay Area is @Visit Tri-Valley (Livermore, Dublin, Pleasanton, Danville region ) and it’s packed with so many fun hidden gems. 🍷🐄🍦 After many years of driving past this area on my way out o

entry.title: Replying to @ERock day 1 leaf peeping! Kancamagus turns into a parking lot around 9/10am but there's still so many fun fall things to do in new england! 🍁 #newengland #october #newhampshire #whimsysoul #whitemountains #kancamagushighway #vlog #falltrip #a

entry.title: Replying to @Massholemamma every state has a city or road nobody else can pronounce. But yours is really hard 😂 #newengland #october #newhampshire #whimsysoul #vlog #kancamagushighway #wisconsin #oconomowoc #milwaukee #vermont #roadtrip #franconianotch

entry.title: Replying to @Liv the themed sweaters keep on coming!! Day 3 of my girls trip to New England! Woke up at the Bluebird Cady Hill and explored downtown Stowe before it got busy. I'm obsessed with the Black Cap and Cold Hollow was worth the stop. So is the S

entry.title: Replying to @dawnellen78 you couldn't pay me to be driving the Kancamagus on a holiday weekend!! 😱 🍁 heads up that Indigenous Peoples' Day is gonna be even more insane. It'll be a parking lot. #newengland #october #newhampshire #newengland #whimsysou
entry.content: Replying to @dawnellen78 you couldn't pay me to be driving the Kancamagus on a holiday weekend!! 😱 🍁 heads up that Indigenous Peoples' Day is gonna be even more insane. It'll be a parking lot. #newengland #october #newhampshire #newengland #whimsysou

entry.title: New England autumn is absolutely worth it, in case you're wondering #newengland #october #newhampshire #whitemountains #falltrip #kancamagushighway #autumn #vermonttiktok #coldhollow #leafpeeping #leaf #massachusetts

entry.title: Fleet Week from a Navy ship?! 😱🇺🇸✈️ Spend a day with me on the @uss_somerset for the Parade of Ship at SF Fleet Week 2024! When @califleetweeks asked me to take part in this experience I immediately said yes. 🇺🇸✈️ 🚢 Living in San Francisco for almost 10 y
